Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches specific skills ('學得桌球基本技術') while promoting lifelong learning and sustainable lifestyles ('培養終身休閒運動') (Target 4.7). Model A's original score best reflects this.

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly '體育[女]' (Physical Education [female]), which can be inferred as a positive action to encourage women's participation in sports, aligning with Target 5.5 on ensuring women's full participation in public life.
